mapper.sql: su.id id, su.title title, su.content content, su.publisher_id publisher_id, su.status status, su.publish_time publish_time, su.update_time update_time
mapper.insert: insert into app_notice ( title, content, publisher_id, status, publish_time, update_time ) values ( #{title}, #{content}, #{publisher_id}, #{status}, #{publish_time}, now() )
